summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 - Barèmes Kilométriques feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. 11/11 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: GET /api/config/baremes returns 200 with all 4 barème types
Each barème has exactly 20 tranches (0-50km in 2.5km intervals)
Frontend: All 4 barème tabs visible (Solide+Gasoil, Solide sans Gasoil, Liquide+Gasoil, Liquide sans Gasoil)
Frontend: 20 price inputs visible for each barème
Frontend: Taux Horaire Minimum input editable
Frontend: Save button works and shows success toast
seed_data_creation: Test data was created and reset during testing (taux_horaire_minimum=75.5, first tranche price=1.25)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 barèmes kilométriques feature fully implemented and tested. The barèmes are stored in MongoDB collection 'config' with id='config_baremes'. Each barème contains 20 tranches of 2.5km intervals from 0-50km. The Configuration page at /configuration displays all barèmes with editable price fields.
